reviews.review_description:
This game is fun to play. Some people are saing it is not working but trust mr went I tell you it is. I play This game 24 7.                           

Sometimes you crash but you can fix that by going to setings by pressing the 3 lines on the left controller. 

It is so nice to just do some tricks or even just slide down the hill.

The people that said they can’t ride have fried brains because it’s obvious that it’s the back triggers to use the board but the two things that get me are  the map for 1 and 2 it says I catch the end of my board a lot making me spin? Probably could update with respawning and fixing something with the fact that it says I caught my board even though I didn’t but I’ve fallen off the map a lot so yeah update the map and probably add a thing where I can teleport back up the slopes

developer_response.body: If you double tap b it should reset your position.  And if the board's edge is catching a lot you could lower the difficulty in settings or turn it off entirely

reviews.review_description: this is super fun because you can just chill after school and snowboard and it’s really chill ￼
No instructions or tutorial, i've no idea how i'm supposed to make it work. I don't even see any settings. Uninstalling.

developer_response.body: There's a control diagram and tutorials in the menu which can be opened with the left menu button. I plan to add a control diagram in the starting map so hopefully that helps

reviews.review_description: This is trash idk the point of it. Also i would play this game if i could actually ride🙄
This game is trash i cant ride

developer_response.body: Did you try the no crash mode? Beginners find that helpful
